description: You use the elements in the io folder to convert data between byte[ ], characters, and InputStream representations. The io folder contains services for reading and writing bytes, characters, and streamed data to the file system.
These services behave like the corresponding methods in the java.io.InputStream class. For more information about InputStreams, see the Java documentation.

services.name: pub.io:bytesToStream
description: WmPublic. Converts a byte[ ] to java.io.ByteArrayInputStream.

input_parameters.name: bytes
description: The byte array to convert.

input_parameters.name: length
description: Optional. The maximum number of bytes to read and convert. If length is not specified, the default value for this parameter is the length of the input byte array.

input_parameters.name: offset
description: Optional. The offset into the input byte array from which to start converting. If no value specified, the default value is zero.

output_parameters.name: stream
description: An open InputStream created from the contents of the input bytes parameter.

usage_notes: This service constructs stream from the byte array using the constructor ByteArrayInputStream(byte[ ]). This constructor does not make a copy of the byte array, so any changes to bytes will be reflected in the data read from the stream.

services.name: pub.io:close
description: WmPublic. Closes an InputStream or a reader object and releases the resources.

input_parameters.name: inputStream
description: Note: You can use either inputStream or reader to specify the input object. If both the input parameters are provided, then both the objects will be closed.

input_parameters.name: reader
description: Optional. An open reader object.

usage_notes: If the InputStream is already closed, invoking this service has no effect. However, leaving an InputStream open may cause errors that are not recoverable until Integration Server is shut down. Use the pub.io:close service to explicitly close the input stream when a service leaves it open. For example, pub.file:getFile and pub.client.ftp:get leave the input stream open in the pipeline.

services.name: pub.io:createByteArray
description: WmPublic. Creates a byte array of the specified length.

input_parameters.name: length
description: The length of the byte array to be created.

output_parameters.name: bytes
description: The new byte array.

usage_notes: The pub.io:read service reads data from an InputStream into a byte array. You can use this service to create the byte array. Invoking this service is the equivalent of the Java code new byte[length].

services.name: pub.io:mark
description: WmPublic. Marks the current position in the InputStream or reader object.
A subsequent call to pub.io:reset repositions this stream at the last marked position. Marking and respositioning the input stream allows subsequent service calls to re-read the same bytes.

input_parameters.name: stream
description: Note: You can use either stream or reader to specify the input object. If both stream and reader input parameters are provided, then both the objects will be marked.

input_parameters.name: reader
description: Optional. The reader object.

input_parameters.name: limit
description: The maximum number of bytes that can be read before the mark position becomes invalid. If more than this number of bytes are read from the stream after the pub.io:mark service is invoked, the pub.io:reset service will have no effect.

output_parameters.name: stream
description: Conditional. The InputStream. Returned only if the input parameter is stream.

output_parameters.name: reader
description: Conditional. The reader object. Returned only if the input parameter is reader.

usage_notes: If the InputStream does not support the mark operation, invoking this service has no effect.
Either of the optional input parameters, stream or reader, is required.

services.name: pub.io:markSupported
description: WmPublic. Enables you to test whether your InputStream or reader object supports the mark and reset operations.

input_parameters.name: stream
description: Note: You can use either stream or reader to specify the input object. If both stream and reader input parameters are provided, then the stream input parameter is ignored.

input_parameters.name: reader
description: Optional. The reader object.

output_parameters.name: stream
description: Conditional. The InputStream. Returned only if the input parameter is stream.

output_parameters.name: supported
description: - true indicates that the InputStream supports the mark and reset operations.
- false indicates that the InputStream does not support the mark and reset operations.

output_parameters.name: reader
description: Conditional. The reader object. Returned only if the input parameter is reader.

usage_notes: Either of the input parameters, stream or reader, is required.

services.name: pub.io:read
description: WmPublic. Reads a specified number of bytes from the InputStream and stores them into a buffer.

input_parameters.name: stream
description: The InputStream. Object from which the service is to read bytes.

input_parameters.name: offset
description: Optional The offset into the byte array in the buffer to which the data is written. If no value is supplied, this defaults to 0.

input_parameters.name: length
description: If the value supplied for length is greater than the length of buffer, an exception will be thrown.

input_parameters.name: buffer
description: The buffer into which data is written. This is a byte array, which can be created from a Flow service by invoking pub.io:createByteArray.

output_parameters.name: stream
description: The InputStream. If any bytes were read from the stream, the stream is repositioned after the last byte read.

output_parameters.name: buffer
description: The buffer into which data was written.

output_parameters.name: bytesRead
description: The number of bytes read from the InputStream and copied to buffer. If there is no more data because the end of the stream has been reached, bytesRead will be -1.

usage_notes: The pub.io:read service does not close the input stream. To close the input stream, use the pub.io:close service.

services.name: pub.io:readAsString
description: WmPublic. Reads the data from a reader object and returns the contents as a string.

input_parameters.name: reader
description: The reader object.

input_parameters.name: length
description: The maximum number of characters to read from the input reader object.

output_parameters.name: reader
description: The reader object.

output_parameters.name: lengthRead
description: The number of characters read from the input reader object. If there is no more data because the end of the stream has been reached, lengthRead will be -1.

output_parameters.name: value
description: The data read from the reader object, or null if end of stream has been reached.

usage_notes: The readAsString service does not automatically close the reader object. To close the reader, use the pub.io:close service.

services.name: pub.io:readerToString
description: WmPublic. Reads the data from a reader object and converts it to a string.

input_parameters.name: reader
description: The reader object.

output_parameters.name: string
description: Data read from the reader object.

usage_notes: The readerToString service does not automatically close the reader object. To close the reader, use the pub.io:close service.

services.name: pub.io:reset
description: WmPublic. Repositions the InputStream or the reader object to the position at the time the pub.io:mark service was last invoked on the stream.

input_parameters.name: stream
description: Note: You can use either stream or reader to specify the input object. If both stream and reader input parameters are provided, then both the objects will be reset.

input_parameters.name: reader
description: Optional. The reader object.

output_parameters.name: stream
description: Conditional. The InputStream. Returned only if the input parameter is stream.

output_parameters.name: reader
description: Conditional. The reader object. Returned only if the input parameter is reader.

usage_notes: If the InputStream does not support the reset operation, invoking this service has no effect.
Either of the input parameters, stream or reader, is required.

services.name: pub.io:skip
description: WmPublic. Skips over and discards the specified number of bytes or characters from the input stream or a reader object.

input_parameters.name: stream
description: Note: You can use either stream or reader to specify the input object. If both stream and reader input parameters are provided, then the stream and reader object data will be skipped.

input_parameters.name: reader
description: Optional. The reader object.

input_parameters.name: length
description: The number of bytes or characters to skip.

output_parameters.name: stream
description: Conditional. The InputStream. Returned only if the input parameter is stream.

output_parameters.name: reader
description: Conditional. The reader object. Returned only if the input parameter is reader.

output_parameters.name: bytesSkipped
description: Conditional. The actual number of bytes that were skipped. Returned only if the input parameter is stream.

output_parameters.name: charactersSkipped
description: Conditional. The number of characters that were skipped. Returned only if the input parameter is reader.

usage_notes: Thepub.io:skip service uses the uses the Java methodInputStream.skip, which might skip some smaller number of bytes, possibly zero (0). This happens due to conditions such as reaching the end of file before n bytes have been skipped. For more information about the InputStream.skip method, see the Java documentation on the InputStream class.
Either of the optional input parameters, stream or reader, is required.
If both stream and reader input parameters are specified and if an exception occurs during the stream object usage, then the operations are not performed on the reader object also.

services.name: pub.io:streamToBytes
description: WmPublic. Creates a byte[ ] from data that is read from an InputStream.

input_parameters.name: stream
description: The InputStream that you want to convert.

output_parameters.name: bytes
description: The bytes read from stream.

usage_notes: The pub.io:streamToBytes service reads all of the bytes in the input stream. Then the service closes the input stream and produces the byte array. The bytes variable remains in the pipeline until it is explicitly dropped.

services.name: pub.io:streamToReader
description: WmPublic. Converts a java.io.InputStream to a java.io.Reader object.

input_parameters.name: inputStream
description: The InputStream to convert to a reader object.

input_parameters.name: encoding
description: Optional. Name of a registered, IANA character set (for example, ISO-8859-1). If you specify an unsupported encoding, the system throws an exception. If no value is specified or if the encoding is set to autoDetect, the default operating system encoding is used.

output_parameters.name: reader
description: The reader object read from inputStream.

services.name: pub.io:streamToString
description: WmPublic. Creates a string from data that is read from an InputStream.

input_parameters.name: inputStream
description: The InputStream to convert to a string.

input_parameters.name: encoding
description: Optional. Name of a registered, IANA character set (for example, ISO-8859-1). If you specify an unsupported encoding, the system throws an exception. If no value is specified or if the encoding is set to autoDetect, the default operating system encoding is used.

output_parameters.name: string
description: Data read from inputStream and converted to a string.

usage_notes: The pub.io:streamToString service reads all of the bytes in the input stream but does not close the input stream. You must invoke pub.io:close to close the input stream.

services.name: pub.io:stringToReader
description: WmPublic. Converts a string object to a java.io.StringReader object.

input_parameters.name: string
description: The string to convert to a StringReader object.

output_parameters.name: reader
description: The StringReader object.

services.name: pub.io:stringToStream
description: WmPublic. Converts a string to a byte stream.

input_parameters.name: string
description: The string object to be converted.

input_parameters.name: encoding
description: Optional. Name of a registered, IANA character set (for example, ISO-8859-1). If you specify an unsupported encoding, the system throws an exception. If no value is specified or if the encoding is set to autoDetect, the default operating system encoding is used.

output_parameters.name: inputStream
description: An open InputStream created from the contents of string.
